name: Best Lemonade
directions: Into a 1 quart Jar with tight fitting lid, put sugar and lemon peel, or zest;  add 1 1/2 cups very hot water (not from tap!). With lid fitted firmly, shake jar until sugar is dissolved.
Add lemon juice. Refrigerate until chilled.
To Serve: Into each 12-ounce glass, over ice cubes, pour 1/4 cup of the lemon syrup.
Then add chilled club soda or, if you prefer, water.
Stir to mix well.

name: Old Fashioned Lemonade
directions: Combine sugar and lemon juice with 1 cup of water. Stir until sugar is dissolved, then add remaining water. Serve over ice.

name: Adams Sunrise
directions: Fill blender to fill line with ice.
Fill blender half full of Vodka.
Add lemonade concentrate (more or less to taste) and water to full line on blender.
Top with the sugar and blend until smooth and slushy.
Enjoy!

name: Bay Breeze
directions: Combine all ingredients in a shaker or glass with ice and shake or stir.  Serve over ice!

name: Summer Breeze
directions: mix all ingredients together.
pour over ice in tall glass.
slice lime or lemon wedge and squeeze into glass slightly.
rub wedge around topside of glass and place in drink.
get the sunglasses, a good book, sunshine, and enjoy!

name: Sweet Tea
directions: Infuse loose tea into hot water for 4 to 5 minutes.
Strain tea into room temperature water.
Sweeten with simple syrup if desired.
For simple syrup:
In a small non-reactive pot combine 5 cups of sugar and 3 cups of cold water.
Slowly bring to a boil and add 6 sliced lemons and a few sprigs of fresh mint.
Remove from heat.
Allow to cool 10 minutes and strain.

name: Original Lemonade
directions: Mix sugar and boiling water in a bowl and mix until all the sugar has dissolved. Set aside.
Juice lemons into a separate bowl.
Strain lemon juice into water and sugar mixture and stir.
Pour mixture into a litre container (or similar) and fill with cold water (around 3 cups).
Add food colouring and ice if desired.

name: Blueberry Lemonade
directions: Place blueberries and sugar in a blender with a few teaspoons of water and puree.     Place lemon juice and water in a large pitcher.   Strain blueberry mixture into the pitcher and stir well.
Serve over ice with a sprig of mint for garnish.
You can also make this an "adult" friendly drink, by mixing with 2 ozs vodka per serving.

name: Best Lemonade
directions: For the lemon syrup:.
Place the sugar into a food processor equipped with a steel blade.

Using a microplane or a zester, remove the zest from at least one lemon being very careful to avoid any white pith. Measure out I tablespoon of zest. How many lemons are needed to reach one tablespoon depends on the size and variety of lemons you are using.
Add zest to the sugar in the food processor and process for 10 seconds.
Starting with the lemons you zested, squeeze them to get 1 1/2 cups of strained juice. Set juice aside.
In a medium saucepan, bring 1 1/2 cups water to a boil. Turn off the heat. Add the sugar mixture and stir until the sugar is dissolved. Add the strained lemon juice and stir.
Transfer mixture to a jar or container with a tight fitting lid and refrigerate until cold.
To make single servings: Pour 1/4 cup of the lemon syrup into a tall glass. Add ice cubes and 3/4 cup cold water or seltzer water. Stir and enjoy.
To make a whole pitcher: Pour entire jar of syrup into large pitcher. Add 12 cups cold water or seltzer. Stir. Add ice cubes. Serve in tall glasses over ice.

name: Apple Lemonade
directions: Combine juices and sugar; stir until sugar dissolves.
Chill and serve over ice.
Garnish with lemon slices and mint leaves.
